title: General — Multiple-Address Letter Use
plain_language_rule: Use a multiple-address letter when sending identical correspondence with the same subject to two or more addressees or activities within the Department of the Navy. Do not use multiple-address letters when enclosures differ per addressee, addressees are at different command levels, or letters require individual signatures.
source_text: TBD - exact manual text required before activation
renderer_impact: Determines whether the correspondence uses a single-address or multiple-address format, affecting To line, Distribution line, and copy assembly.
notes: This section explains when to use (or not use) multiple-address letters. It is a procedural decision rule, not a layout validation rule. Some sub-conditions (different enclosures per addressee, addressees at different command levels) are judgment calls not amenable to automated enforcement.
